infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Boonmate uses the microphone for voice chat with Boon AI.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Boonmate needs access to your photo library to update your profile and share posts.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Boonmate uses the camera to capture photos for your profile and posts.

plugins.photosPermission: Boonmate needs access to your photos to update your profile and share posts.
